channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >Choose Life. Choose a job. Choose a career. Choose a family. Choose a fucking big television, choose washing machines,… — 36 replies — 144.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>Choose Life. Choose a job. Choose a career. Choose a family. Choose a fucking big television, choose washing machines,…

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-04-01 16:10 UTC

OP

>Choose Life. Choose a job. Choose a career. Choose a family. Choose a fucking big television, choose washing machines, cars, compact disc players and electrical tin openers. Choose good health, low cholesterol, and dental insurance. Choose fixed interest mortgage repayments. Choose a starter home. Choose your friends. Choose leisurewear and matching luggage. Choose a three-piece suit on hire purchase in a range of fucking fabrics. Choose DIY and wondering who the fuck you are on Sunday morning. Choose sitting on that couch watching mind-numbing, spirit-crushing game shows, stuffing fucking junk food into your mouth. Choose rotting away at the end of it all, pissing your last in a miserable home, nothing more than an embarrassment to the selfish, fucked up brats you spawned to replace yourselves. Choose your future.

>Choose life... But why would I want to do a thing like that? I chose not to choose life. I chose somethin' else. And the reasons? There are no reasons. Who needs reasons when you've got heroin?

Early replies (first 3)

62060931
do heroin addicts really think theyre above normies

62060938
>>62060923
is this some quote from a book. I dont get it frogposter

62060941
>>62060938
I think it's song lyrics

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62061074
>>62060923

The movie ends with him saying this but unironically

62061075
>>62061074
Good, so tired of movies ALWAYS needing to end with a wholesome twisterino. Especially when movies try to seem cool and edgy

62061082
>>62060923
Trainspotting. Great film.

62061086
>>62061009
It's a direct quote. It's a personal favorite film of mine, I've heard this line countless times.

62061102
I choose the president is trump! You can cope.

62061112
The Zone is a very complicated system of traps, and they're all deadly. I don't know what goes on here when people are absent, but the moment someone shows up, everything comes into motion. Old traps disappear and new ones emerge. Safe spots become impassable. One minute your path is easy, the next it's hopelessly convoluted. That's the Zone. It may seem capricious, but it is what we've made it with our condition. I've seen people stop halfway and go back. Some of them even died on the very threshold of the Room. But everything that happens here depends not on the Zone, but on us!
>So it lets the good ones pass and kills the bad ones?
I don't know... I think it lets those pass who have lost all hope. Not good or bad, but miserable people. But even the most miserable will die if they don't know how to behave. You were lucky. It only gave you a warning.

62061404
>>62061075
The protagonist chooses to live his life instead of escaping with heroin. It IS a wholesome twistereno ending my goy

62061531
>>62061404
Ah frick...fuck movies

62061559
>>62060923

62061566
>>62060931
>Are you happy? I am, man
>Content and fully aware
>Money, status, nothing to me
'
>Cause your life is empty and bare, yeah
>You can't understand a user's mind
>But try with your books and degrees
>If you let yourself go and opened your mind
>I'll bet you'd be doing like me
>And it ain't so bad
Yes

62061642
>>62061559
>choose life

62061743
>>62061559
see how the skin is much dark around the anus and pussy
the cause is a lifetime worth of poopstains

62061764
>>62060923
choose being gay with your dad.

62061998
>>62061743
no it's because puberty turns the skin darker

62062073
>>62061998
no its because of poop you fucking retard

62062076
>>62060923
>.... but who cares when you've got /smg/?

62062080
>>62061074
>>62061075
I like the way Porno ends vs the end of T2 but both are great in their own right.

62062113
It's probably good I'm not rich or else I would totally just do drugs all day

62062117
>>62060923
Ees2Gud1!

62062272
>>62061073
Seems redundant to own two dishwashers.

62062301
>>62061112
I watched Stalker at the very end of a LSD trip. It was absolutely amazing.

62062410
>>62061057
>>62060923
Great movie. Kinda makes being a piece of shit look fun, ngl, but I know in reality that lifestyle is actually fucking horrible

62062423
>>62060923
Trannyspotting?

62062431
>>62060931
they are

62062434
>>62062410
The lifestyle is based, self destruction is based. Only real shrigmas get it. So sick of moralfags and their cookiecutter ways. Laying in a ditch dying is based would do it again no questions asked.

62062435
>>62060941

62062857
>>62062434
Lol
I had a friend who likes that lifestyle. I remember he told me once "rock bottom is a challenge for me". He is a fucked up dude, reminded me of the Savage from Brave New World, he lived like some kinda drug addicted modern savage man

62062916
>>62061559

62062933
>>62062410
>but I know in reality that lifestyle is actually fucking horrible

It's really not that bad. Hanging out with your mates everyday getting high on heroin whilst being financially supported by the tax payer.

62062983
>>62062857
Obviously its a less than ideal scenario but that being said, drugs are cool kids, degeneracy is based.

item.title: INFO CHANNELS — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
INFO CHANNELS

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-01 16:10 UTC

OP

What info channels you use?
Are you and your buddies together in a group chat analyzing each other trades?
Or do you get your info from dreams?

Early replies (first 3)

62062622
Fuck off shill. Kys now, you are part of the scapegoats that get slaughtered

62062633
>>62062622
Hello to you too
What paj.eet stole your money this time?

62062698
>>62062617
I use an elite web forum called /biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62062719
>>62062617
I am in some random discords with some alpha but would prefer some smaller groups.

62062901
>>62062617
back 2023 i had a dream where George Soros told me to invest in minerals. I bought some stocks on $62 and sold at $81 5 months later.

62062981
>>62062719
Tbh recently ownership of a channel got transferred to me because it was dead and I'm trying to revive it a bit.
Pretty much there's only me and another dude, we post our trades and discuss a bit. If you are interested could send an invite

item.title: Should I buy more BTC or altcoins? — 9 replies — 10.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I buy more BTC or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-01 15:22 UTC

OP

BTC is steady and battle-tested. Altcoins can go up more but are riskier.

>You buying more BTC like Saylor does or alts like ETH and SOL this cycle?

Early replies (first 3)

62059768
I'm going all in on SOL

62059809
>>62059007
Allocating a small portion to CreditScoreProtocol * com can generate substantial wealth

62061375
>>62059768
Why all in on SOL?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62061595
>>62061375
It's shit. Full of memecoins

62061647
>>62059809
Nobody knows that bobo

62061683
>>62059007
>eth is better than btc

62061733
Who's saylor? Gay??

62061834
I have to make it. I need a fucking 10x. But I would like to get another 20x (I found a 20x last year and the year before but failed to make it because too little cash to start with). I am grabbing cash from every single source I can if I have 150-200k I can make it with a 6x and a 10x becomes overkill I WILL MAKE IT

Also EdgeX, which is like Hype, launched yesterday so I'm going to put some cash into that.

62062792
>>62059809
How do you do that?

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 230 replies — 120.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 230 • Updated: 2026-04-01 14:19 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62048431
At least 119 of 200 posts are by OP. This should violate a rule.

62048708
>>62045475
You mean there are none?
>>62048431
Obamaleaf was worse

62048850
>>62048431
>You mean there are none?
What would you regard as "influential news"?

62048939
>>62048850
What do you think? Can you define influential

62048959
>>62048939
>Can you define influential
No, because it's a subjective word. To some people a towns hall meting of a town of 500 people might be the most "influential" thing in the world since it affect them, their home town and their lives. To someone else it's a completely irrelevant event because it doesn't affect anyone or anything in their own lives. To some people the war in Iran is completely unimportant and doesn't affect them. To some people, like the Iranians is a life changing event.

The word "influential" news is in the perception of the beholder. I can give you as much stuff as you want, it's just... If you don't care about it then it's not "influental", that's why I'm asking
>What would you regard as "influential news"?
Since every individual themselves need to determine what THEY think is influential for them and tickles their funny bone.

62049007
>>62048939
Here, a google definiton; Influential describes
someone or something with the power to cause change, shape decisions, or exert significant impact on people or events. It implies having high status, authority, or being highly important (e.g., an influential leader or book).

62049042
>>62048939
>>62045442
>>62048708
If you can't even define what you want then how can I even give it to you, right? I can only give you something you can actually define.

62049654
>>62048959
>>62049007
>>62049042

You literally shill this fucking coin. Do some influencing

62051513
>>62049654
Yes. Define "influencing". What would INFLUENCE YOU? Naked ladies? Hackatons? Drugs? New technical developments? What influences YOU? If I just post something then you'll be like "No, that's not good enough", so what's the actual point if I can't give you EXACTLY what you want?

62051763
>>62051513
From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight, nope an idiot

62051818
>>62051763
>From reading the thread I thought you had some intellectual insight
You tell me what you think is an "intellectual insight"? What would convince you? Throwing a hissy fit and getting emotional at me doesn't really work...

62052015
>>62051763
I'm not sure if I'm making myself clear enough. Define what you think would constitute for something that YOU consider an "intellectual insight" in your own mind? Can you post a piece of information from another chain that amazed you, that made you think, that made you say "Oh shit, this is lit"? I hope I've made myself clear enough good sar.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056424
>>62051763
100$ end of bull run. Here, some influencing for you.


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056570
>>62051763
>>62049654
>>62048939
>>62048708
>>62045442
Here you go. Let me influence you young Vishnus of the mindchain; https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU
DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).

62056612
>>62056570
>DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).
This is JUST one of the possible applications. Of course you'll be able to execute ANY arbitrary operation on-chain, like any Web2 cloud can. Imagine a WHOLE GAME deployed on-chain. Literally every step of your character, every emote, every chat message, every loot drop and pick up being on-chain. You'll of course also be able to run AI agents and shit like that... DOT is the ONLY chain capable of doing MILLIONS of TPS once NOMT + JAM get implemented
NOMT alone will x10 the throughput of the whole DOT chain. https://www.rob.tech/blog/introducing-nomt/ and https://github.com/thrumdev/nomt and https://www.reddit.com/r/Polkadot/comments/1nzjhuq/what_has_happened_to_nomt/ and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N3BX2eTqpro

So what's getting shipped this year that's considered "influential" for out young Vishnus of the mindchain? JAM, NOMT, the Polkadot App and more stuff (instant unstaking (unstaking will go from 28 days do 1-2 days)), project individuality (proof of personhood that doesn't require KYC, 500ms block (Basti blocks), and more)

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056623
How do I buy this shit and how long do I hold

62056631
When will you incels realize shitcoins only go up if bitcoin goes up, it doesn’t matter how much ‘bullish’ news a shitcoin gets

62056642
>>62056623
What do you mean "How do I buy this shit"? Bro, if this comes of as mean, it's not meant as mean and I'm sorry if it sounds mean. If you can't figure out how to buy something yourself then please just don't buy it at all. Make yourself a favor

>>62056631
You do realize that this won't be true forever? And that certain projects do decouple from BTC when they're ripe for it.

62056686
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU

Oliver makes a really good point here where he tries to point out that like 4 years ago L2s could just exist and people would use them and NOW people are demanding that the L2s upgrade and improve in order to still be considered useful. At this point I would like to add an additional thing. The thing that people want from major L2s (like Arbitrum and AVAX and other stuff like that) is what DOT L2s already have. The major L2s can't compete with DOT because they're behind and once JAM hits they'll be even more behind. In the time DOT gets JAM the L2s won't even have what DOT has RIGHT NOW. DOT has shared security, it has built-in native SAFE bridging (that's not even a bridge, it's a XCM, it uses HRMP channels), because of the shared security it DOES NOT fragment liquidity, you can use the functionality of ANOTHER chain on DOT (so of other DOT chains and other chains in general that aren't on DOT). Once people realize that they can EASILY build on DOT while every other chains LIMITS them in some shape or form they'll start flocking to DOT. Every other chain has a ton of problems that DOT simply DOES NOT therefore DOT is technologically speaking superior. Sooner or later the developers will catch onto it and start developing on DOT since the other chains have limited capabilities. You can only develop humdrum applications on ETH, no innovation will ever come out of ETH ever again. ETH is obselete and unreconcilable. Sure it'll stay relevant for a few more year but how much longer can it stand the test of time? BTC is windows 1.0, ETH is windows 98, DOT is Windows 12 lol (Yes, not Windows 11, it's windows 12).

62056998
>>62056631
The game is changing. This bear market will prove it

62057110
>>62056998
>The game is changing.
What do you see anon? Help us understand what you see when you say "The game is changing". And yes, I do agree that stuff will shift from stupidity back to usability. So, meme coins were the LAST DROP. Enough is ENOUGH. We need to go back to our roots and invest into stuff that actually makes sense and is GROUND BREAKING. If we don't pivot in this liminal time then the industry as a whole will be finished for like 10-20 years UNTIL we pivot there is no way forward. We need to REALIZE that BTC is crap, ETH is crap, SOL is crap, USDT is centralized shit, XRP is useless, TRX is a cult run piece of shit, lol BCH is in the top 10 WTF, DOGE is crap, BNB is fucking crap. It's all just useless junk. Literally the whole of top 10 is fucking garbage that's unusable. It's literally all Windows 1 and Windows 98 type of coins while we already have the Vishnu of the mindchain, the Windows 12 of blockchains, the collectibe 1/9 Lamborghini Veneno Roadster of the blockchain, the fucking Rolls-Royce of the blockchain industry, and we're still stuck with the fucking Windows 1 and Windows 98 of the blockchain industry. Guys, it's time for FUCKING CHANGE. Either we pivot to the 3rd generation blockchains or the whole sector will GO UNDER for a decade or two. Do you want to suck cock for 10 to 20 years? Or do you just market sell your garbage gen 1 and gen 2 tokens/coins and move on with your life and buy the actual technical innovation? It's choice time and it's GOOD to know that any day you can change your whole fucking life. If you want the world to change then the first step to changing the world is to CHANGE YOUR FUCKING SELF. You only need to 1. WANT THE CHANGE and 2. BELIEVE YOU CAN CHANGE (Self-efficacy). Those are the 2 most important principles of BEHAVIOURAL CHANGE. Change your behaviour and with that you'll change the world. Sure it'll take time and effort but hey, even wallowing in your misery, being depressed takes time and effort.

62058962
>>62056631
Algorand is pumping while Bitcoin is dumping because it is quantum secure. Nigger

62059225
DOT will reach the $1.60 range before this week ends

62059268
>>62057110
See was that so hard on being influential?

62060540
>>62059268
The thing is, that "influenced" you... Doesn't mean it influenced the other people. Everyone is a unique little program and therefore needs unique inputs in order to produce the desired output. One man's trash is another man's treasure

>>62058962
Nagger

62060621
100$ end of the FUCKING bull run. Here's some influential and intellectual insights

62060648
>>62060540
How do you know. Besides the intent of you making this thread was to educate/shill/ influence the mass retards on this site, don't try to convince me otherwise

62062169
>>62060648
>How do you know.
What do you mean by that? How do I know what?

62062500
>>62060648
How I know that people are unique little programs and that I need to input unique inputs to get the desired outputs? Is that what you're asking or?

62062550
Let me "influence" you young Vishnus of the MINDchain. Listen to one of our spiritual leaders Oliver Talé-Yaźdi how he talks about the Vishnu mindchain. Join our cult *kmh* *kmh* web3 organization where we talk about the new world order.

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2039256751346700502

item.title: 6 FIG HELL — 22 replies — 35.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
6 FIG HELL

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-04-01 15:36 UTC

OP

HOW DO I PUSH IT TO 7 FIGS AAAAAAAAAARHHHHHHHHHH

Early replies (first 3)

62062096
>>62062044

Wait.

62062307
>>62062044
Buy accounts into prop firms until you get accepted. Learn orderflow and put all the gains on bitcoin or international stocks. You have a lot of money to lose trying to pass the prop firm test, you should be okay anon.

62062320
>>62062044
Only 2.5% of Americans have 1M.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62062334
How is it THAT hard?
You made it to 4 figs, 5 figs, 6 figs....

Just keep going?

62062341
>>62062044
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62062348
>>62062320
>25% have $2k liquid
Whelp it may not be gorillionaire but least I’m in the top 25%, bottom 75 are officially Goyim.

62062379
>>62062348
25% only 2k liquid? Wtf?

62062406
>>62062379
That’s how poor majority of people and Americans are.
Remember, the majority of the internet are people like this.

62062413
>>62062341
i was a millionaire until I got Trump'd.

62062417
>>62062413
Then you were still poor.
Get a professional wealth manager.

62062452
you just need to make more money, there's no other recourse

investing is a meme currently. expect 5-7% returns annually over the next decade. there will be no 10-15% from the insane bull market we just had unless you're willing to play with leveraged assets

62062482
>>62062406
25% is a lot. How tf they survive if something happens? If they crash the car they are done?

62062548
>>62062482
They live paycheck to paycheck

62062570
>>62062320
This isn't a good example because I would explicitly have millions if I had put it all into BTC in september 2020 when it was around 9k, taken profits at 45k a year later in december under the assumption that december was the top just following the 2017 chart. And then followed the 2017 chart again by buying in november 2018 at 20k with all I had, which would then easily have amounted to over a million in december 2025- and this is assuming I am retarded and strictly follow the 2017 bottoms and tops as a model, not even attempting to sell high and buy low.

62062579
>>62062406
if people werent retarded spenders they would have money saved
>>62062482
no they will just ask the bank to borrow even more money

62062604
>>62062482
I don't think it's true because they must have money in their 401k. I think it's mostly just a statement on how little people keep LIQUID, not in total. If you fuck yourself up and need cash obviously you have tosell investments and things to cover it.

62062610
>>62062348
Top 24% means nothing to me.
Most people have shit lives, beating that isn’t an achievement

62062619
>>62062044
Wait until you get to 7 figure purgatory. Too much money to not want to work but too little to live life

62062754
>>62062044
I fell out of 6 figures hell a few months ago and now I just want to get back

62062764
>>62062610
True. I want to live at a 5-star resort and have fun every day.

62062843
I’m making 4 figs.
t. NEET

62062848
>>62062619
Yeah.
Moral of the story.
Dont have kids if your kids are going to be struggling poor or working class.

62051982

hate em all think they're dumb so gay too

62054546

bro , link didnt even break ath this cycle. there is no hope for link. cant even ride up with bitcin, founders atill dump millions. ita only going to go lower.

not even trying to fud. no clarity act wont increase hype. and no banks are not trying to surpress price.

there is no hype and no demand. no community ,

62054560

62054650
>>62015802
I admire your dedication OP. The amount of eternally poor linkfag seethe that you have generated is more than all the twitter fudders put together. Respect.

62054880
>>62054560
cisco is a good comparison, except it's like 2005 instead of 1996.
just 20 more years until we get back to all time high!

62055022
soon all stinkies will be so poor they won't even know what's going on anymore. they'll be like: wtf, where'd my money gooooo lmao lmao LOL LOL lmao

62057405
i'll never ever ever stop laughin at stuuupid stiiiinks. hate em alllll
think they suuuuuuck

62057472

linkedin<ko-fi and patreon

alpha like this being openly posted daily is why ill have no sympathy for nolinkers in the future
>b...but we didnt know
kek

62061283

item.title: KABOOOOOOOOOOM **MASSIVE** RIPPLE XRP NEWS JUST LEAKED — 20 replies — 18.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
KABOOOOOOOOOOM **MASSIVE** RIPPLE XRP NEWS JUST LEAKED

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-04-01 15:08 UTC

OP

Ripple is partnering with Convera to expand enterprise cross-border payments.

Together, they’re combining global payment rails with stablecoin-enabled settlement to improve speed, liquidity, and reliability.

>https://x.com/Ripple/status/2038969816187285516 (not fake or clickbait)

Early replies (first 3)

62057459
>>62057451

62057468
>>62057451

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62057502

62057599
uhh can i get a

BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62061203

62061366

62061409

62061530
>>62057451

62062460
>>62058935
>>62057468
These niggers cant google KEEEK

Originally known as Western Union Business Solutions before its 2021 acquisition, Convera reported over USD 190 billion in turnover in 2025 and serves more than 26,000 businesses worldwide. Headquartered in Seattle, it employs 1,001-5,000 people and focuses on tech-driven solutions for FX, compliance, and risk management.

62062479
>>62057451

XRP not needed lol

62062595

>dumps

62062632
>>62062595

62062694

item.title: This Iran "war" is just America purposefully reducing China's oil reserves by forcing Iran's hand to block the strait an… — 26 replies — 13.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
This Iran "war" is just America purposefully reducing China's oil reserves by forcing Iran's hand to block the strait an…

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-04-01 14:20 UTC

OP

This Iran "war" is just America purposefully reducing China's oil reserves by forcing Iran's hand to block the strait and is tactically amazing, ballsy, but also such an asshole selfish move. This coming directly after they kidnapped the Venezuelan president, which was step one. Venezuela has the most untapped oil reserves of any other country and has been purposefully fucked with for decades. Now that the countries has been seized by America and is awaiting a pro-American political puppet AND the Hormuz Strait is now closed, defacto... America is in control of all oil! Asia (China) needs Iran's oil. It's their only way of getting it. Trump has them now by their oily balls.

>current setup:
China controls most mineral deposits
America controls most oil wells

PROVE ME WRONG!

Early replies (first 3)

62053338
>>62053274
China is still buying Iranian oil

62053342
>>62053274
Bullish for uranium and thorium.

62053344
>>62053274
China is exporting oil so this isn’t true.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62053347
>>62053338
Cope

62053354
>>62053344
Retard

62053356
>>62053274
China is the only country still getting oil out of the Persian Gulf. Good job, retard lmao.

62053362
America can't shit on China the way you're talking about because there's a country named Japan and this country called Japan holds trillions of US Debt. This county named Japan is also struggling with inflation for the first time in many many years. This country named Japan is an industrial nation that makes things with oil they buy from the gulf.

If this country known as Japan is sufficiently threatened with increased input costs its export driven economy will speculatively drive its currency even weaker. Because this country you may not have heard of called Japan is sitting at over 200% debt to gdp ratio they can't really afford that. So to keep their currency from going to shit trying to control their bond yield curve they would have to liquidate US debt.

As I'm sure you're famliar with the United States of America I won't walk you through why Japan liquidating US debt is bad for the US. This is strategically why what you're talking about is not the US strategy at all.

62053367
>>62053274
It's pretty obvious, the big oil companies specifically said that the price of oil is too low to make developing venezuela viable. So he had to make the price go up.

62053374
>>62053362
Japan won't do shit, they will get bailed out by the fed and even if they dont usa has a 3rd bomb ready

62053400
>>62053354
Says the child who made this thread to cope in his delusion. This Epstein war has done nothing to impact China’s oil trade.

62053410
>>62053374
Japan will do shit which is why the treasury has rate checked already once this year to tamp the usd/yen ratio back down.

62053414
>>62053400
Im not op and also, I accept your concession

62053457
>>62053338
>>62053344
>>62053356
>>62053362
>>62053367

62053877
>>62053274
the strait is only closed to american and american allied vessels
>China is an american ally
whew lads, you dont know what biz will come up with these days

62054036
>>62053274
unfortunately there was no plan, no strategic vision, and this is cope

62054183
>>62053274
>goys this has nothing to do with israel
kys, retarded OP

62054227
>>62053274
Oy vey, short term pain for long term gain goyim!

62054297
this >>62053274 is the kind of retards that visit this board.
think about it next time you read "advice" from some TA faggot or whatever.

62056094
>>62053274
You know they can still get it from Russia and they are still getting oil from Iran right?

62056137
>>62054297
I noticed this a long time ago. This board is just retards playing in a sea of delusions and sunk cost fallacies.

62056323
When trump destroy Iran's oils, china won't be able to still get oil from Iran, that's what will happen because trump won't conquer karhg island because either way it will get destroy.

62056335
Can't tell whether OP is a retard or jewish.

62059103
>>62053274
It doesn't fix America. It's just an attempt to take everyone down with them. Far from being a ballsy move, it's an acceptance that America is unsalvageable.

62062484
>>62053274
>PROVE ME WRONG!
Why should i prove you wrong? You are the 1% that think almost clearly.
Normies will say that it's because iran will have the bomb soon.
Semi normies (trumpists) say that the war on iran is to circumvent the city of London control on cargo ship insurance (completely stupid theory but give the Qanon trumpists any stupid explanation to explain how trump is fighting the Cabbal, and they'll believe it).

However, in your explanation, you mentionned oil, which is correct, but i think it's more closely linked to the petrodollar, than oil directly. Iran has been selling it's oil to China in chinese Yuan currency since 2023. That is not good for the petrodollar. Reminder that Saddam Hussein was killed by the americans because he wanted to sell his oil in gold instead of dollars, and that Gaddafi was killed for the same reasons. Petrodollar is key. Now inb4 a cheap dollar is good for american economy (more competitive exports), sure it's true, but still the dollar has to not collapse either. Hence the forced petrodollar, hence the war on Irak, Lybia, and Iran.
Now geostrategic control of oil is very good for america also. But probably only the second objective.

62062540
>>62056094
Yes, China is indeed america's real ally. Things are now how they appear in the media or in the alt medias.
China is the american factory. The real adversary of america is europa. This iran oil crisis has been planned and is very good for america in that europa is dependant in oil. Europa will see it's cost of production increase, and will become less competitive. America will take over europa's markets. Yes, it is their geostrategy to crush europa, and read Zbiniew Zbrezinsky if you don't believe it.

62062553
>The US opens up another big oil resource next door with Venezuela
>immediately fucks things up in the MidEast again to grind oil production to a halt there

There is something about that sequence. At the end of the day though the likeliest explanation was Bibi twisting Trump's arm to have America do their dirty work.

item.title: Another Saylor just dropped. Now he's posting AI generated videos of females telling you to buy STRC and get 11% yield.… — 40 replies — 11.7/hr

Another Saylor just dropped. Now he's posting AI generated videos of females telling you to buy STRC and get 11% yield.…

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-04-01 12:47 UTC

OP

Another Saylor just dropped. Now he's posting AI generated videos of females telling you to buy STRC and get 11% yield. He is desperate

Early replies (first 3)

62053644
>>62053587

62053647
fuck shkreli more than anything

saylor will be the first trillionaire

62053648
>>62053587
Or usurious bank yields are really that predatory these days in comparison

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62054117
>>62054102
Go back to Albania, Marty

62054141
>>62053849
give me a rundown

62054185
>>62053587
if even shkreli knows its a scam we're FUCKED

62054251
>>62054141
>a usa jew said a balkan jew was cool and a goy believed it

62054306
>>62054102
L'chayim good evening!

62054825
>>62054185
This, Shkreli is pretty with pharma, but retarded when it comes to tech

62054830
>>62053647
Shkreli is based, I watch all his livestreams

62054909
>>62054141
https://youtu.be/80BXR4zX2EE?si=OTMdmOm9Z3kWmPPM
16 minute video.

62055163
>>62054909
dude just GIVE ME the RUNDOWN!!!

62055248
>>62054306
My nigga shkreli isn't a jew

62055660
>>62053587
If they were real girls and occasionally said they loved and were proud of me in between telling me to buy $STRC, this would work on me.
t. khhv who spends all his income on OF, ASMR, and Twitch streamers and would die for Israel or whatever if they got a qt to tell me she needed me to. Luckily they haven't figured out how extreme a simp I am.

62055692
>>62053587
>another crypto rug pull
>11% yield
No thanks I can bleed money, have tech exposure and still get 11% with JEPQ

62055828
>>62053587
How long till the SEC gets involved with this scammer?

62055962
>>62055828
At the very least it would have to wait until the republicans are out of office so the SEC can be refunded and directed to do their job again

62056339
We literally have a scammer using AI females to catch simps to give him money to leverage buy bitcoin

This is not gonna end well

62057831
>>62055660
Bro do nofap or something, this is no way to exist

62059850
>>62057831
>>62055660
Or just get a practice gf or fwb (its easier than you think) to get that energy out. You get more positive energy rebound that way.

62059950
>>62053647
I don't agree with his drug price gouging despite his copes, but I don't really care because he gives out a lot of interesting information. His sycophants are degenerate though lol.

62059975
>>62053587
anything shkreli says is bad, is good.

62060091
>>62054079
How?

62060099
>twitter screenshot thread

62061010
>>62059850
>practice gf
I consider this deeply immoral.
>fwb
I'm not sure I would be able to resist falling in love with her.
>>62057831
>nofap
It wouldn't help much I don't think. It might even make it worse for a bit.

62061053
This dipshit makes me want to sell my BTC so bad. Can't believe how retarded he is.

62061149
>>62053587
A criminal calling out another criminal? What is this, criminalception?

62061255
>>62053660
Kicked dog syndrome. Dumb goys have been abused so long they dont even know what decent treatment looks like. Its perfectly normal to give someone 100% of your money, let them lend it out for free, then hoard 94-99% of the profit for themselves.

62061323
>>62053587
that's like d grade rates

62061414
Shabbat shalolm

62061447
Rents due.

62062037
>>62061010
Practice gf is a soft euphemism, but yes I agree doing that on purpose would be immoral
>couldn't resist falling in live w fwb
That is a legitimate trap, and good on you for being honest w yourself about it. It takes a certain amount of heartbreak and cynicism to really get there. The point of the comment was that you need to just get a bad relationship out of the way so you have a far better idea of what you want.
>nofap would be worse
It is worse for approximately 10 days. A lot worse. You'll relapse many times before you hit that mark. You still should try it anyway as an exercise in discipline. This sounds difficult to believe with your current mindset, but after 3 to 4 weeks you don't even think about masturbation anymore except as a novelty

62062196
>>62053587
I don't want to like Saylor but everytime I see a jew kvetching because of him it makes me want to buy his stock.

62060223

62060227

62060338

62060353
>>62060338
They get sold in less than a week. That is why you hardly see them listed. It is the foot dragging house flippers refusing to sell below speculation. Frankly there are too many of those assholes.

62060378
>>62060338

I would sell it for $500k because less hassle, faster sale, it needs some work, I paid $75k for it, and $500k is the limit I can take tax-free

62060383
>>62060175 >>62060180

62060390
LISTEN UP SNOWFLAKE!!!!!!!!!! I BUSTED MY BUTT MOWING LAWNS FOR THREE WHOLE SUMMERS TO AFFORD MY DOWN PAYMENT!!!!!!!!!!!!! MAYBE IF YOU SPENT MORE TIME PUSHING A BROOM AND LESS TIME PLAYING NINTENDO YOU WOULD BE A HOMEOWNER BY NOW!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

62060393
>>62059978

62060505
>>62060393
kys migat

62060539
>>62059294
If you think plywood is an inferior building material, you never built anything in your life. Chipboard and fiberboard are shit. Plywood is awesome. Even the lower quality construction grade is stronger and more dimensionally stable than solid wood. And the really good stuff - baltic birch plywood - is golden. That's what high end speaker cabinets are made of.

item.title: What the fuck is going on with MSFT? How is this not a great entry? Convince me to not go all in by monday. — 78 replies — 11.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
What the fuck is going on with MSFT? How is this not a great entry? Convince me to not go all in by monday.

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-04-01 09:11 UTC

OP

What the fuck is going on with MSFT?
How is this not a great entry?
Convince me to not go all in by monday.

Early replies (first 3)

62043952
because the music has stopped

fucking cretin

62043962
Just buy gold and gold mining stocks.

62043971
>>62043947
I would wait until i see signs of of absolute panic.
And even then only go in for a medium term trade.
Liquidity is not great and there are big IPOs coming that will absorb even more of it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62050538
I boughted a $500 jan/2027 leap at $400
Watch these niggers go bankrupt

62050570
I work as a Dynamics365 software developer. Do you guys think is time to switch to another career?

62050633
>>62043947
Nobody has ever gone broke betting on Microsoft. They are a shit company, but the entire world runs on Excel spreadsheets.

62050873
>>62043947
Just do it. This is a temporary economic crisis almost at the same level as covid. You can set yourself up for a great situation once the dust settles. I was a millionaire after the crash in 2020 because I never stopped my DCA and I loaded up lumps sums of cash into tech stocks and BTC while everyone here was posting pinkjaks.

62050883
>>62043947
Hey, I work at Microsoft as a Senior Data Center Technician. It's an absolute mess. We're have soooo many data centers going up, including an OpenAI project, but with the cracks clearly showing in OpenAI's profitability, as well as Sora getting shut down, there is a lot of tension in the air. We just got a hiring freeze nationwide, if I'm not mistaken. Our network engineers are all outsourced to India. We do not have an on-site NOC at any of our facilities, as far as I'm aware. These street shitter network engineers are completely incompetent and projects drag because of them. In addition, dIvERsiTy iZ oUr StrEngt here, so a lot of new techs we hire are incompetent brown/black trash. One manager just hired his son. I'm probably going to be quitting the data center world once this bubble pops, which is most likely this year.

62051391
>>62043947
Because when you go all in on AI, you lose. Shrimple as.

62051399
Great entry for a short

62051403
>>62050633
No one went broke betting on the turkey before thanksgiving

62051497
>>62043947
the company is jeeted to a point where you have to wonder if they can ever get back from that

62051499
Biz as always, low IQ people blaming everything on indians. Like if MICROSOFT hasn't been shit forever. But now, it's all indians fault. Sure buddies. Fucking retards

62051760
>>62049635
>>62049655
You're burying the lead. The level of goodwill they lost from the Xbone cannot be understated. They were saying insane shit like the kinect would be able to count how many people were in your living room watching a movie, and the rental price would dynamically change to accommodate it. And you wouldnt even be able to lend your game discs out, theyd be hard linked to your console.

Only for Sony to hit the stage at the next E3 and announce a "dynamic" new way to lend your game to friends. Only for one exec to walk up, then cheekily hand his ps4 disc to another exec. And some shit about all processing being handled in "the cloud", which gamers immediately saw through as Oh we wont really own our games theyll be on Microshit's servers forever. It was a fucking debacle all around. Even the price, Xbone was $499, PS4 was $399.

62051770
”we support bipoc trans gamers” - minecraft title screen after jeetsoft acquisition

62051787
>>62043947
In those 3 peaks I see
>exuberance
>metered enthusiasm that is beginning to wane
>desperation
where we are now, it might try to rechallenge the previous high, but it will fall short and then we'll start to see the 'exposé' articles hit the news after it starts plummeting
I have no position in ms, just how I see it going down

62051789
>>62051499

>Microsoft was always a mixed bag
>now there are Indians on top of that

how does this not make sense to you

62051794
The company is failing because it is too jeeted. The cheap labor pumped up the stock to astronomically high levels. But now the effects of that are lowering the value of the company product. So the sock has to go down as investors look to alternatives for better products.

62051822
>>62051497
Usually when the rot (Indians or other nepo groups) gets past a certain points its just irreversibly fucked.
Not a collaspe by any means but just slowly fading into irrelevance and incompetence like the legacy tech companies (IBM, HPE, whatever)

62051849
>>62051822

IBM is the best example. It was huge. America's first premier tech company. It should still be so. But nope. They were the first to take the mass Indianification poison pill, greedy execs looking for cheaper workers, until it backfired and the Indian clan had enough collective power to take it over entirely. Now it's just an eternally irrelevant dinosaur and they squat on the embers collecting whatever spare pennies they can off of it.

62051889
>>62051499
msft was garbage first, but they improved and XP and later Win7 were kinda ok, but then sudenly they started implementing jeets and everything went to shit

62051895
>>62043947
MacroHard gonna pummel Microjeet like a Pajeeta girl on her first night off the plane in Texas getting pounded by big white cock.

62052017
>>62049474
and it still isn’t worth it to use

62052128
>>62043947

It’s because they attached themselves to the hip to openAI. Same as oracle, market knows Altman is a scammer

62053062
>>62048780
Azure is also trash, even open AI is trying to switch to AWS and they opened a law suit against them.

62053066
>>62049594
>They deserve to die for what they did to Halo
This.

62054681
>>62050175
sybau

62054695
>>62043947
No Indian company should be worth 2.67T

62054705
>>62047799
Remember that firmware update from Microsoft a few months back that supposedly was a bug that fried few peoples SSDs?
Good times

62054994
>>62051399
no it isnt, you shouldve shorted months ago lol now its a long ish wait 2-3 weeks for hammer fists

62056532
>>62054695
True.
And everyone hates America now.
Many are moving away from Microjeet and Azure.

62061658
>>62047766
DIS NIGGA USIN ICT LMAO
DOW Theory for zoomers

62061676
>>62043947
>since this post 4 days ago, it has began a head-n-shoulders off support at 350
Good luck believers.

item.title: DUDE JUST PAY 40% OF YOUR INCOME FOR 30 YEARS STRAIGHT FOR A WOODEN BOX LMAO — 37 replies — 6.5/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-04-01 10:32 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62059267
>>62059262
>FOR A WOODEN BOX LMAO
More like, to finance wars for Israel

62059272
>>62059262

62059282
Only rizzless chuds think this is a bad thing btw. You are the minority. You have lost.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62059320
>>62059304
Chuds care about other people having families (but they would never ever have sex)

62059331
>>62059262
For me its just 20% for 15 years.
Just dont live above your means.

62059340
>>62059320
That can't be true, I'm a chud and I have a family and sex every night. I'm more of a gigachud though.

62059361
>>62059262
40% of your income for 30 years is also the cost of income tax because israel and africa need our money more than we do

62059382
>>62059262
You got me convinced.
What's your alternative?

62059403
>>62059262
If you live in USA, a paper box is the best you can do.

62059413
>>62059262
Just put money into a Roth IRA so you can finally enjoy life at 60 lmao.

62059599
>>62059267
Why don't you talk to Iraq war veterans about the wooden box.

62059602
>>62059262
Have you seen lumber prices lately? Best i can do is a plastic storage tote from dollar tree.

62059609
>>62059262
50 years buddy

62059618
>>62059262
whats the alternative nigga? join the mafia or your local crips gang or what

62059640
>>62059262
It's moreso the land you are paying for

62059646
>>62059282
I live in a shithole commie-block with thin walls (in America). I'm forced to hear my neighbors having sex. But I return the favor by having this one nerdy/emo/gamer black chick come over and I fuck her in the room right above their bedroom and make them listen to it for hours.

Fuck those assholes.

62059744
>>62059262
Yes Mr. government man.

62059784
>>62059331
This, mine is 10 years and it's my first house.

62059801
>house hacking with 3 other roommates and they pay my mortgage for a 775k house

Am I winning? I always just sat in my room and played video games anyways

62059944
>>62059801
>>house hacking
is that an euphemism for leeching off from your friends? are you jewish? you sound jewish

62059963
>>62059293
land is nice. chickens and a garden never have to buy food again

62060057
>>62060000

62060351
>scale the cost of living with local wages so it always inescapably takes the same proportion of his income

62060830
>>62059801
These sounds worse than just living with your parents (even if you have schizo parents).

62060843
>>62059262
Homeowners get instant sex with women.

Seriously nothing gets women going faster than a guy with a steady income and a house. They'll fuck you just to keep their names on your list of possibles

62060879
>>62059801
Why the FUCK would you ever want house mates?

So you spend your entire peak-adult life living with others like a teenager?

At that fucking point why dont you just rent your house out and live with ur parents

Jesus Christ some of you are Fucking RETARDED

62060932
>>62060843
Lol, or you can just be tall amd White. I get all the Black, Latina and SEA pussy I want.

>>62060879
4 dudes living in a million dollar mini-mansion sounds chill. Like one of those content creator homes.

>nooooooo you have to grow up and live a boring life like the rest of us!!!!! Reeeeeee!!!

62061045

The real world ain't going to deal with itself buddy

62061047

62061153

62061353

Kek it’s funny how seething some people are naturally.

62061836

62061877

item.title: Home ownership is no longer affordab..AAACK — 33 replies — 3.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Home ownership is no longer affordab..AAACK

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-04-01 05:19 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62058794
Owning a house is for cucks

62058804
>>62058794
rent is due tomorrow rentoid

62058817
>corrugated iron
>breezeblocks
Damn, at least in Jamaica I didn't have to pay 141k for this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62058894
>>62058794
This, house coin baaad saar, buy rental coins blody!

62058906
>>62058785
>Dude! Just take the type of housing that has been a byword for being a FAILURE for nearly a century!
How compelling.

62059140
>>62058785
Now show the median price before covid and the great BRRRR

62059191
>>62058785
a mobile home for near 150k??!!

62059248
>>62058785
Make sure you own the land its on. There are a lot of companies going around jacking the rents up.

62059273
I live around Tampa (Pinellas county) and they are literally demolishing all the mobile home parks to build these copy paste apartment buildings.
Apparently they say mobile homes don't hold up well in hurricane season! (theyve been standing for 50 years no problem though, pay that no mind)

The real explanation is Florida is changing thanks to all the new yorkers etc moving in. The old folks retirement mobile home snowbird community is from a bygone era

62059302
>>62058804
So is lot rent, Trailer Trash.

62059374
You don't own the land for starters and ask grok about what your insurance payment is for a mobile home in Tampa.

62059394
>>62058785
Affordable home prices are essential for the society to be healthy and thriving. What's happening now is a sign of the collapse.

62059398
>>62058804
Property tax is due, hoomer.

62059418
>>62058785
The problem is land, specifically the cost of local infrastructure rather than housing itself. I can easily find used mobile homes ready for transport at 1-5k from the 1980's and 1990's. The costly problem is where to put them. If you think trailer parks are a safe option, your (mostly) wrong. The parks lease out space now for between $400-$1000 per month. You in the end you still pay rent and utilities. The only way to win is to own the land your house sits on. The truth is, you kind find cheap lots without any infrastructure at all. Like in forests and deserts. The problem becomes keeping your city infrastructure and your house close enough to be livable. It's possible to buy a shed and place it in the middle of nowhere to make a "1 room cabin" however to get clean water, food and power out that far on a budget is a nightmare. You'd pay more upfront going off grid than you would if you lived in the dead center of your town.

>>62059191
Depends on location and scale, I've seen 2000's 3 bed 2 bath splits in a retirement community go for about that much.

>>62058906
If you own the land, then you can save your rent or mortgage payment while you live in the FAILURE HOUSE to build a shiny new one without giving the bank squat. When your done you can sell it to old folks who want to downsize or rent it out. It's a stepping
stone to your dream house, not the final destination.

>>62059374
>What about insurance? Or refinancing options?
If your asset doesn't have a high value, why spend the money to ensure it? I understand you might want to ensure a large purchase, but you'd want to ensure what's inside your home, rather than the home itself. I'd suggest Agreed Value Coverage for assets like art, antiques, and memorabilia. Then put the rest into tangible goods that don't spoil like metals and jewels.

62059448
>>62058785
>lot rent
>55+ community

62059473
>>62058906
>you can't live below your means and live in a trailer because normies will think you're a failure
You deserve to be a debtslave

62059746
>>62058785
Lot fees on mobile homes are insane. I looked at one as a joke and it was $60k for a sad double wide and lot fees were $1200 a month, which is like 2x to 4x more than the HOA fees for a nice condo. Absurd.

62059774
>>62058785
the THING with trailers is that you may own the trailer itself but you still have to PAY RENT cause you dont own the lot, AKA fuck this scam

62059823
>>62059418
Except now with solar panels and Starlink, and a cistern you can pretty much go offgrid.

62059844
Retired at 25.

62059939
>>62059823
Let's cover all three:
For the sake of argument, lets use the OP's pic:
a 1979 Skyline Buddy 14' X 64'

Buying the house itself is simple. I found one going for 5k. Lets assume you do the pick up and transport to save 1-3k depending on distance to the final location.

If you plugged into the grid in a rural, low population area (which would have better cost to value) it generally ranges from $133 to over $287 monthly after you put in the hookups. This comes with a massive up front cost for most properties (in the range of 50-100k). Residential trash service typically costs between $20 and $80 per month. Residential internet costs $35 per month.

Now lets go off grid:
Start with electricity
200-amp service is highly recommended to accommodate modern amenities like central air conditioning, electric clothes dryers, or electric water heaters without overloading the whole system. A 200-amp service upgrade for solar, including a new panel, breaker work, and a battery installation, typically costs between $10,000 and $20,000+

Starlink costs typically involves a one-time $349 - $599 hardware fee for the dish and router. With the added cost of $120/mo (400+ Mbps) for internet.

Water's next:
Above-Ground Cisterns can cost up to and surpass $10,000, however you also need to setup your own filtration system. Complete, pre-packaged, whole-house kits often range from $2,500 to over $3,000.

Then comes the wastewater septic tank, which tact's on another total installation ranging from $3,600 to over $12,000.

Next is mail, if you done have a postage address (i.e your land lies outside of a residential district) then you need to buy a P.O. Box at a nearby post office which adds between between $5 and $30 per month.

Next is trash, which when you stare down the barrel is a nightmare. You have to be your own trash man, which means sorting, burning and shipping out your metals papers and plastics.

Overall off grid ends up being 45k before labor and $170 per month.

62059948
>>62059939
Also note job availability.
If there is no work in the woods, it's harder to justify the lifestyle. With how much more companies are replacing online workers with offshore ones or automating them completely it's becoming a harder and harder dream to fulfill and keep. If you already have a stable job in a populated area it may be more feasible to find an empty lot near it than to completely unplug from the world and retreat into the internet.

62059952
>>62059774
>don't own a house: pay rent to live in a house
>own a mobile house: pay lot rent to live in a house
>"own" a house: pay property tax rent to live in a house
there is no way to own a house in the US, you will ALWAYS pay rent

62060002
>>62058785
other houses usually increase in value. mobile homes always lose value.

62060344
>>62058785
$150k for a mobile home..

62060370
>>62059952
3 bed 2 bath
house
$2,600+ per month

mobile home lot rent
$1,200+ per month

mortgage home payment
$2,500+ per month

own land and house
$180 per month

Uh, the winners clear

62060579
>>62060370
You can get a welfare phone for free and sleep under the highway offramp near the skatepark for $0 and all you have to do is blow a couple of homeless dudes to protect you.

62060622
>>62059273
>new yorkers

62060640
>>62058785
141K to live in the methnostate? Not including the cost of land, cost to move your “mansion on wheels”, and cost to hook up utilities and plumbing.

62060915
>>62058785
Mobile shit boxes down 5%, cost of living up 20%

62061004
>>62058785
Pad rent fucks any financial utility of these things into the fucking ground (that you're renting). Fucking useless.

62061119
>>62058794
This. Buy land, not the home. Boomers fell for the home is your greatest investment(sorry kids) meme. The land can provide

62061134
>>62058785
Private equity and similar own all the lots mobile homes are on and raise the rates to whatever they want. It takes like $100-300k those poorfags don't have to move one of those homes and you can't plunk it anywhere you want, so it's a great way to get ultracucked.
